_meta: Localized alt texts for the listing images, order: [feature (hero-feature), screenshot 1 (frame2-the-receipts), screenshot 2 (frame4-mechanism), screenshot 3 (frame6-b2b)]. Each must be ≤64 characters (validated by scripts/build-localized-frames.mjs). Paste into the Partner Dashboard per-language media alt fields.
